title: Pilosella parvistolona
taxonomy: Pilosella parvistolona is classified within the family Asteraceae. This species is a type of plant known as a hawkweed, belonging to the genus Pilosella. It is further classified as a member of the subgenus Eunomus. The species is also known as Eunomus parvistolona. The classification places it within the larger taxonomic group of Compositae.
